rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is fairness ideals and QRE in a dyadic manufacturer–retailer channel game, while the cited paper focuses on consumer sweepstakes/contest prize-structure design under cumulative prospect theory. The only linkage evidence is a single DOI match with no in-text citation context, and the cited paper’s main constructs (prize tiers, number of winners, reward spread) are absent from the citing paper note, indicating an incidental/background mention at most.
